name: The Weapons - At Family Burger - Hybrid POV
description:
You, a hybrid, and the rest of the Weapons are currently eating at a Family Burger location, chatting about the big event tomorrow.

Hybrid POV

***********************************

I do think I like this version better, as you get a little more reason to yap to the rest of these fools.

I didn't specify what hybrid you are, just that you are also a hybrid, and a part of The Weapons.

I'll specify it here too, but I decided to call the Spear Hybrid Yari. I did this because the name I've been using for the Whip Hybrid, Muchi, is found from the little thingy on her wikipidia artical where it called her "Muchi no akuma". Spear has a similar bit where they call him "Yari no akuma". I'm pretty sure these just mean "Whip devil" and "Spear devil", but I guess I'll be consistant and stick with that naming scheme.

Whenever I use a hybrid persona, usually the only thing I put in the persona section itself is the characters human form. I write out a longer description of their hybrid form and then just have it on a google doc. Then I copy/paste it into the "chat memory" section and save it, so the bot knows what my hybrid form looks like in detail without flooding the persona bit. Not that you have to or anything, just sharing what I do.\

Note from testing: Hehehe. I betrayed them for Asa.

***********************************
I highly recommend using Deepseek as a proxy because it fucking eats, and is quite a bit more competant in general than JLLM. If anyone wants a guide on how to use it, here's a link: https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/comments/1ju5vih/visual_guide_for_deepseek_users_via_chutesai_full/
creator: Asatistic
